# PDE syllabus — semester 6

## Module 3 — Boundary value problems
- Laplace equation, harmonic functions.
- Separation of variables.
- Green's function is a likely 12-mark exam topic. (Frequency in last 5 years: 4/5.)
- Sturm–Liouville theory.

## Module 4 — Wave and heat equations
- Method of characteristics.
- Fourier series solutions.
